title: Single, Sch C self-employment + 1099-NEC, TX
description: Sole-proprietor consultant. One 1099-NEC for $80k gross with $15k Sch C expenses → $65k net SE income. Exercises Sch SE, QBI §199A 20% deduction, deductible-half-of-SE adjustment. No state tax (TX).
expectations: QBI deduction = 20% × min(QBI, taxable) → meaningful reduction
Total tax includes SE + income tax
